records.content: Policy rule for Benefits / public casework controls: execution may proceed only when current source records close the exact requested action boundary. Communication text cannot override source-control records.

Current control record does not close the required dependency. The record for inspection waiver, emergency code, and voucher period match is missing, stale, mismatched, expired, unsigned, unapproved, or scoped to a different action than temporary housing voucher with inspection waiver authority.
